text.title: Rfc Lite Pm Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Rfc Lite Pm Template.

example.scenario: RFC 'Magic-link signup'. Problem: 'card-required signup costs 38% drop-off (analytics dashboard, last 30d)'. Evidence: 4 transcripts + 1 chart URL. Scope-in: magic-link, 24h expiry, fallback password. Scope-out: SSO, social. Outcome ID OBR-Q2-001. Owner @ruslan, reviewer @nero, review 2026-06-23.
